name: Miscellaneous (Newly) Oppai Vtuber bot
description:
Was messing with some ai image stuff and it gave me an idea for a bot so I decided to make it. The scenario includes Mint, Filian, and Bao alongside Dokibird, with a bit of oppaification happening to each of them, and I also added Doki being a roommate cause why not?

As always I hope you enjoy the bot and lemme know if there's anything I can improve with it. Or hell, if you think there's another bot I could do with this scenario with other vtubers then leave a comment.

And here are some generations of the other girls in the bot, and also another Oppai Doki (she grabbed one of your shirts when hers broke)

I tried to make the Filian one do a handstand but no luck.

And then finally the Doki one

(Edit: all the images in the description seem to have been broken as a result of the tos change so for right now I can only put back the Doki one, but it was my favorite one so that's fine)
Edit 2: THE DOKIBOOBS ARE REAL
creator: Pandapple
